item.title: Chrysler Pulled Out of the Bushes
item.description: A Chrysler is recovered from the bushes using towing and rescue equipment in a real-world recovery operation. The focus is on the pull, the setup, and the field work involved.

media:content.media:title: Chrysler Pulled Out of the Bushes
media:content.media:description: A Chrysler is recovered from the bushes using towing and rescue equipment in a real-world recovery operation. The focus is on the pull, the setup, and the field work involved.

item.title: Testing the Limits of the Shop Crane
item.description: A shop crane is pushed to its limits during a demanding lift, demonstrating its strength and safety capabilities. How much can it really handle?

media:content.media:title: Testing the Limits of the Shop Crane
media:content.media:description: A shop crane is pushed to its limits during a demanding lift, demonstrating its strength and safety capabilities. How much can it really handle?

item.title: I Don't Need a Rotator
item.description: A recovery job is completed successfully without the use of a rotator, showcasing skillful technique and efficient equipment use. What made this possible?

media:content.media:title: I Don't Need a Rotator
media:content.media:description: A recovery job is completed successfully without the use of a rotator, showcasing skillful technique and efficient equipment use. What made this possible?

item.title: Pulling a Tractor From the Pond
item.description: A submerged or partially submerged tractor is carefully pulled from a pond using heavy recovery equipment. How did it end up there?

media:content.media:title: Pulling a Tractor From the Pond
media:content.media:description: A submerged or partially submerged tractor is carefully pulled from a pond using heavy recovery equipment. How did it end up there?

item.title: Toyota Recovery After Leaving the Road
item.description: A Toyota vehicle is retrieved after leaving the roadway, highlighting the steps needed to prevent further damage. What caused it to go off course?

media:content.media:title: Toyota Recovery After Leaving the Road
media:content.media:description: A Toyota vehicle is retrieved after leaving the roadway, highlighting the steps needed to prevent further damage. What caused it to go off course?

item.title: Getting This Truck Back on the Road
item.description: A stranded truck is successfully recovered and returned to drivable condition after a challenging situation. What was the key to getting it moving again?

media:content.media:title: Getting This Truck Back on the Road
media:content.media:description: A stranded truck is successfully recovered and returned to drivable condition after a challenging situation. What was the key to getting it moving again?

item.title: Towing a Dually, a Harley and a Camper
item.description: A complex recovery involves a dually truck, a Harley, and a camper, all requiring careful handling and coordination. How do you manage multiple loads at once?

media:content.media:title: Towing a Dually, a Harley and a Camper
media:content.media:description: A complex recovery involves a dually truck, a Harley, and a camper, all requiring careful handling and coordination. How do you manage multiple loads at once?

item.title: Hooked Up and Ready for Recovery
item.description: A vehicle is secured and prepared for a controlled recovery operation, with all systems in place for a safe tow. What happens next in the process?

media:content.media:title: Hooked Up and Ready for Recovery
media:content.media:description: A vehicle is secured and prepared for a controlled recovery operation, with all systems in place for a safe tow. What happens next in the process?

item.title: Navigating the Navigator Back to Safety
item.description: A stranded Ford Navigator is guided back to safe ground after leaving the roadway. How did it end up off track?

media:content.media:title: Navigating the Navigator Back to Safety
media:content.media:description: A stranded Ford Navigator is guided back to safe ground after leaving the roadway. How did it end up off track?

item.title: Midnight Recovery Mission
item.description: A recovery mission takes place under the cover of night, where lighting and timing become critical factors in success. What challenges come with working in darkness?

media:content.media:title: Midnight Recovery Mission
media:content.media:description: A recovery mission takes place under the cover of night, where lighting and timing become critical factors in success. What challenges come with working in darkness?

item.title: Pulling a Semi Out of the Mud
item.description: A stranded semi truck is carefully extracted from thick mud using controlled pulling and recovery equipment. What caused it to sink so deep?

media:content.media:title: Pulling a Semi Out of the Mud
media:content.media:description: A stranded semi truck is carefully extracted from thick mud using controlled pulling and recovery equipment. What caused it to sink so deep?

item.title: Heavy Duty Towing Process
item.description: A step-by-step look at professional heavy-duty towing, showing the coordination, tools, and strategy needed for large recoveries. What makes these jobs so technical?

media:content.media:title: Heavy Duty Towing Process
media:content.media:description: A step-by-step look at professional heavy-duty towing, showing the coordination, tools, and strategy needed for large recoveries. What makes these jobs so technical?

item.title: Jack-Knifed, Tangled, and Wedged Peterbilt
item.description: A Peterbilt ends up jackknifed and wedged in a difficult position, requiring precise recovery techniques to untangle and stabilize the scene. How did it get this complicated?

media:content.media:title: Jack-Knifed, Tangled, and Wedged Peterbilt
media:content.media:description: A Peterbilt ends up jackknifed and wedged in a difficult position, requiring precise recovery techniques to untangle and stabilize the scene. How did it get this complicated?
